info.title: Verana Indexer API
info.description: REST API for the Verana indexer: ecosystems (EC), credential schemas (CS), participants, trust deposits (TD), metrics, and indexer meta.

get.description: Retrieve a Corporation by its numeric id, DID, or group_policy_address. Includes members and governance framework versions/documents.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Corporation numeric id, DID, or group_policy_address

200.description: Successful response with the Corporation

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Corporations with their members and governance framework versions/documents.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

200.description: Successful response with list of Corporations

get.description: Retrieve the change history for a Corporation (by numeric id, DID, or group_policy_address), ordered by block height ascending.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Corporation numeric id, DID, or group_policy_address

200.description: Successful response with the Corporation history

get.description: Return the latest block height that has been fully processed by the indexer.

200.description: Current indexed block height

height.description: The latest block height that has been fully processed by the indexer

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the checkpoint was last updated (ISO 8601 format without milliseconds)

get.description: Replay persisted ecosystem, credential schema, and participant indexer events after a block height. Use the did query parameter to return only events related to a DID.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: DID to replay events for. Only rows persisted for this DID are returned.

parameters.name: after_block_height
parameters.description: Return events with block_height greater than this value.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return.

200.description: Indexer transaction events

get.description: Returns the indexed snapshot for DID-linked objects at the block selected by the At-Block-Height header (or the latest indexed block when omitted). Only applies to current tables that expose a height column; does not query history tables.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: DID to fetch the snapshot for.

200.description: Snapshot response

schemas.description: Credential schemas linked to the DID.

get.summary: Get indexer version and environment info
get.description: Return the indexer version and network environment configuration details.

200.description: Indexer version and environment information

get.description: Return the current operational status of the indexer, including whether it is running, whether crawling is active, and any error information if crawling or the indexer has stopped. This endpoint is useful for monitoring and debugging indexer issues.

200.description: Indexer status information

is_running.description: Whether the indexer service is running. If false, all APIs will return 503.

is_crawling.description: Whether the indexer is actively crawling new blocks and transactions. If false, APIs remain available but no new data is being indexed.

stopped_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the indexer or crawling stopped (if applicable)

stopped_reason.description: Human-readable reason why crawling or the indexer stopped (if applicable)
stopped_reason.example: Crawling stopped due to: Unknown Verana message types: /verana.pp.v1.MsgCreateRootParticipant. Indexer APIs remain available.

last_error.description: Details about the last error that caused crawling or indexer to stop (if applicable)

stack.example:
Error: Unknown Verana message types...
    at ...

service.description: Service name where the error occurred

example.stopped_reason: Crawling stopped due to: Unknown Verana message types: /verana.pp.v1.MsgCreateRootParticipant. Indexer APIs remain available.

X-Crawling-Reason.description: Reason why crawling stopped (only present when crawling is stopped)

schema.example: Crawling stopped due to: Unknown Verana message types...

X-Crawling-Error.description: Error message that caused crawling to stop (only present when crawling is stopped)

X-Crawling-Stopped-At.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when crawling stopped (only present when crawling is stopped)

get.summary: List entity changes at a block height
get.description: Return all indexed entity changes committed at the block selected by the At-Block-Height header (or the latest indexed block when omitted).

200.description: Entity changes recorded at the requested block height

next_change_at.description: The next block height greater than the requested block_height that has any indexed change events. Null when there is no later change.

activity.description: List of activity items at this block height (same format as history endpoints)

get.description: Retrieve a specific Ecosystem by its ID

parameters.name: trust_data
parameters.description: Trust data enrichment mode for DID-bearing objects: null (default), summary, or full.

200.description: Successful response with Ecosystem details

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Ecosystems with optional filtering

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

parameters.name: only_active
parameters.description: Filter by active status. If true, returns only active ecosystems (archived is null). If false, returns only archived ecosystems (archived is not null). If omitted, returns all ecosystems (both active and archived). Active/inactive is determined by the archived field (null for active, timestamp for archived).

parameters.name: participant
parameters.description: Participant account. TRs where this account is EC corporation or holds an active participant on a schema in the EC.

parameters.name: min_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (exclusive).

parameters.name: min_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of network slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of network slash events (exclusive).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Comma separated list of sort criteria. Prefix with - for descending, + (or nothing) for ascending. Allowed attributes: id, modified, created, participants, participants_ecosystem, participants_issuer_grantor, participants_issuer, participants_verifier_grantor, participants_verifier, participants_holder, active_schemas, weight, issued, verified, ecosystem_slash_events, ecosystem_slashed_amount, network_slash_events, network_slashed_amount. Default: -modified

parameters.name: trust_data
parameters.description: Trust data enrichment mode for DID-bearing objects: null (default), summary, or full.

200.description: Successful response with list of Ecosystems

get.description: Retrieve current system parameters for Ecosystem

200.description: Successful response with Ecosystem parameters

get.description: Retrieve the activity timeline for a Ecosystem, showing all changes ordered by transaction timestamp descending. Returns only changed values in the changes field.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Ecosystem ID to retrieve history for

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of activity items to return (default: 64)

parameters.name: transaction_timestamp_older_than
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to paginate results. Returns only activities with timestamps older than this value.

200.description: Successful response with Ecosystem activity timeline

get.description: Retrieve a specific Credential Schema by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Credential Schema ID to retrieve

200.description: Successful response with Credential Schema details

get.description: Retrieve the JSON Schema definition for a specific Credential Schema

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Credential Schema ID to retrieve JSON Schema for

200.description: Successful response. Returns the JSON Schema definition as a JSON object.

schema.description: Credential schema JSON Schema definition (with $id overridden by indexer).

example.error: JSON Schema not found for Credential Schema: 3

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Credential Schemas with optional filtering

parameters.name: only_active
parameters.description: Filter by active status. If true, returns only active schemas (archived is null). If false or omitted, returns all schemas (both active and archived). Active/inactive is determined by the archived field.

parameters.name: issuer_onboarding_mode
parameters.description: Filter by issuer onboarding mode . Values may be v3 short names or v4 *_PROCESS names — normalized when filtering.

parameters.name: verifier_onboarding_mode
parameters.description: Filter by verifier onboarding mode . Values may be v3 short names or v4 *_PROCESS names — normalized when filtering.

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return in the response

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sort criteria. Prefix with '-' for descending, '+' or nothing for ascending. Allowed attributes: id, modified, created, participants, participants_ecosystem, participants_issuer_grantor, participants_issuer, participants_verifier_grantor, participants_verifier, participants_holder, weight, issued, verified, ecosystem_slash_events, ecosystem_slashed_amount, network_slash_events, network_slashed_amount. Default: -modified

parameters.name: participant
parameters.description: Participant account. Schemas whose EC corporation matches or where the account holds an active participant.

parameters.name: min_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (exclusive).

parameters.name: min_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of network slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of network slash events (exclusive).

200.description: Successful response with list of Credential Schemas

get.description: Retrieve current system parameters for Credential Schemas

200.description: Successful response with Credential Schema parameters

get.description: Retrieve the activity timeline for a Credential Schema, showing all changes ordered by transaction timestamp descending. Returns only changed values in the changes field.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Credential Schema ID to retrieve history for

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of activity items to return (default: 64)

parameters.name: transaction_timestamp_older_than

200.description: Successful response with Credential Schema activity timeline

get.description: Retrieve a specific Participant by its ID

parameters.name: trust_data

parameters.name: participant_state

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sort criteria, prefixed with - for descending, and + (or nothing) for ascending. Allowed attributes: id, modified, created, participants, participants_ecosystem, participants_issuer_grantor, participants_issuer, participants_verifier_grantor, participants_verifier, participants_holder, weight, issued, verified, ecosystem_slash_events, ecosystem_slashed_amount, network_slash_events, network_slashed_amount. Default: -modified

parameters.name: min_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_ecosystem_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of ecosystem slash events (exclusive).

parameters.name: min_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Minimum accepted number of network slash events (inclusive)

parameters.name: max_network_slash_events
parameters.description: Maximum accepted number of network slash events (exclusive).

parameters.name: trust_data
parameters.description: Trust data enrichment mode for DID-bearing objects: null (default), summary, or full.

200.description: Successful response with list of Participants

get.description: Return pending tasks for a given account grouped by Ecosystem and Credential Schema. Supports At-Block-Height header for historical state.

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of ecosystems to return

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sort criteria. Prefix with '-' for descending, '+' or nothing for ascending. Allowed attributes: id, modified, created, participants, participants_ecosystem, participants_issuer_grantor, participants_issuer, participants_verifier_grantor, participants_verifier, participants_holder, weight, issued, verified, ecosystem_slash_events, ecosystem_slashed_amount, network_slash_events, network_slashed_amount. Default: -modified

parameters.name: trust_data
parameters.description: Trust data enrichment mode for DID-bearing objects: null (default), summary, or full.

200.description: Successful response with pending tasks grouped by ecosystem and credential schema

get.description: Return global current metrics across all Ecosystems and Credential Schemas. Supports At-Block-Height header for historical state.

200.description: Global metrics

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Participant Sessions

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

200.description: Successful response with list of Participant Sessions

get.description: Find participant beneficiaries based on issuer and verifier participants

200.description: Successful response with beneficiary participants

example.error: No beneficiaries found for issuer_participant_id: 1 and verifier_participant_id: 2

get.description: Retrieve the activity timeline for a Participant, showing all changes ordered by transaction timestamp descending. Returns only changed values in the changes field.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Participant ID whose history will be returned

parameters.name: response_max_size
parameters.description: Maximum number of activity items to return (default: 64)

parameters.name: transaction_timestamp_older_than
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to paginate results. Returns only activities with timestamps older than this value.

200.description: Successful response with Participant activity timeline

get.description: Retrieve the recorded history for a specific Participant Session ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Participant Session ID to fetch history for

200.description: Successful response with Participant Session activity timeline

get.description: Retrieve a specific statistics entry by ID or by granularity, timestamp, entity_type, and entity_id

parameters.name: granularity
parameters.description: Granularity of the statistics (HOUR, DAY, or MONTH)

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Type of entity (GLOBAL, ECOSYSTEM, CREDENTIAL_SCHEMA, PARTICIPANT)

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: ID of the entity (required for non-GLOBAL entity types)

200.description: Successful response with statistics entry

get.description: Retrieve statistics with buckets and/or totals for a time range. If granularity is not specified, the method returns the smallest number of buckets by combining MONTH/DAY/HOUR buckets as needed. The response `granularity` will be the smallest granularity present in the returned buckets.

parameters.name: entity_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated entity IDs (e.g. '1,2,3'). Must be empty for GLOBAL; required for other entity types.

parameters.name: result_type
parameters.description: BUCKETS, TOTAL, or BUCKETS_AND_TOTAL. Default: BUCKETS_AND_TOTAL.

200.description: Successful response with statistics

get.description: Returns the number of participants for a given entity (GLOBAL, ECOSYSTEM, CREDENTIAL_SCHEMA, or PARTICIPANT) and role type at a specific block height, based on the entity_participant_changes log.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: Entity ID (required for non-GLOBAL entity_kind; must be omitted for GLOBAL)

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Block height at which to evaluate participants

200.description: Participants count at the requested height

value.description: Number of participants at the given height

post.description: Resolves the Verifiable Trust state for a DID. Always returns the trust-core fields (`did`, `trusted`, `evaluatedAtTime`, `evaluatedAtBlock`, `expiresAtTime`, `corporationId`); every other section is opt-in via its request selector. Point-in-time is selected via the `At-Block-Height` header.

parameters.name: At-Block-Height
parameters.description: Optional block height for a point-in-time query (capped to the last processed trust block). When omitted, the latest indexed block is used.

corporation.description: Include the full `corporation` object (the Corporation whose `did` equals the resolved DID).

ecsCredentials.description: Include the full ECS credentials with subject claims.

services.description: Include non-LinkedVerifiablePresentation service entries from the DID Document.

participations.description: Include participations. `true` defaults to state `ACTIVE`; pass an object with `states[]` to filter.

presentations.description: Include per-VP credential summaries. Sub-flags additionally surface unresolvable/invalid credential ids per VP.

ecosystems.description: Include aggregate metrics for the Ecosystems the DID controls. Sub-flags control archived inclusion and embedded credential schemas.

200.description: OK — the Verifiable Trust resolution response. Optional sections appear only when their selector was set.

404.description: No trust evaluation found for this DID at the effective height.

get.description: WebSocket-companion catch-up for the Verifiable Trust subscribe stream. Returns the same change envelopes as the `/v4/verifiable-trust/subscribe` WS `block` messages, compressed: blocks with no subscribed change are omitted. Use after a disconnection or a detected gap, looping with `nextFromBlock` until it is `null`.

parameters.name: fromBlock
parameters.description: Smallest block height to return changes from (inclusive).

parameters.name: dids
parameters.description: Comma-separated DIDs to filter. Same membership semantics as the WS subscribe (includes the one-hop validator-tree branch). Omit for the wildcard set.

parameters.name: corporation_id
parameters.description: Restrict to the Corporation's expanded membership set. When combined with `dids`, the response is the intersection of both filters.

parameters.name: channels
parameters.description: Comma-separated channel names: trust, ecsCredentials, presentations, services, corporation, participations, ecosystems. At least one must be enabled.

parameters.name: includeParticipantCounts
parameters.description: For the participations and ecosystems channels, also signal participant-count-only changes.

parameters.name: includeIssuedCredentials
parameters.description: For the participations and ecosystems channels, also signal issued-credential-count-only changes.

parameters.name: includeVerifiedCredentials
parameters.description: For the participations and ecosystems channels, also signal verified-credential-count-only changes.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of changed blocks to return. Defaults to 100, capped at 1000.

200.description: Compressed list of changed blocks matching the filters.

currentBlock.description: Latest block the indexer has processed at response time.

blocks.description: Up to `limit` blocks in increasing order that contain at least one matching change. Blocks with no subscribed change are omitted.

changes.description: Same shape as `changes[]` in the WS block messages.

nextFromBlock.description: Smallest block height strictly greater than the last returned block for which further changes are known to exist. Null once the response has reached currentBlock.

get.description: Enumerates the universe of DIDs the indexer can resolve at a frozen snapshot block, so a client with an empty mirror can bootstrap by resolving each via `/v4/verifiable-trust/resolve`. The snapshot block is selected via the `At-Block-Height` header (latest indexed block when omitted). The DID universe is the union of every Corporation `did`, every Ecosystem `did`, the DID of every in-scope Participant, and any DID previously evaluated by the resolver that the indexer still tracks.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned as `nextCursor` by a previous page. Omit for the first page.

parameters.name: corporation_id
parameters.description: Restrict the enumeration to the Corporation's expanded membership set at the snapshot block (direct ownership plus the one-hop validator-tree branch, same semantics as the WS subscribe of IDX-VT-SUB-1).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of DIDs to return. Defaults to 1000, capped at 10000.

200.description: A page of indexed DIDs at the resolved snapshot block.

atBlock.description: Echo of the resolved snapshot block (the `At-Block-Height` value if provided, otherwise the latest indexed block).

dids.description: Page of indexed DIDs in stable sort order across pages.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null (or absent) on the last page.

At-Block-Height.name: At-Block-Height
At-Block-Height.description: Header to query historical state at a specific block height. When provided, returns the state as it was when the specified block finished processing. When omitted, returns the latest indexed state. Must be a positive integer not exceeding the current indexed block height.

ecosystem_id.description: 0 = Corporation's own CGF; otherwise an Ecosystem

event_type.description: Transaction action name, such as CreateNewEcosystem, UpdateCredentialSchema, or StartParticipantOP.

participants.description: Current number of active participants (participant_state=ACTIVE) in this Ecosystem

active_schemas.description: Current number of active schema (not archived) in this Ecosystem

archived_schemas.description: Current number of archived schemas in this Ecosystem

weight.description: Trust deposit value (sum) of the full participant tree of all the Credential Schemas of this Ecosystem since it was created. Only considers participant deposits, not ecosystem or credential schema deposits.

issued.description: Total issued credentials (sum) by all issuers of all the Credential Schemas of this Ecosystem since it was created

verified.description: Total verified credentials (sum) by all verifiers of all the Credential Schemas of this Ecosystem since it was created

ecosystem_slash_events.description: Total ecosystem-governance–based slash events (when an Ecosystem participant is slashed by Ecosystem governance)

ecosystem_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated ecosystem-governance–based slashed amount repaid by participants

network_slash_events.description: Total network-governance–based slash events (when a full Ecosystem is slashed by Verana Council)

network_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated network-governance–based slashed amount repaid by the ecosystem

trust_data.description: Resolved trust payload for the DID at the same level as did. Null when trust_data=null or trust resolution is unavailable.

participants.description: Current number of active participants (participant_state=ACTIVE) in this Ecosystem

active_schemas.description: Current number of active schema (not archived) in this Ecosystem

archived_schemas.description: Current number of archived schemas in this Ecosystem

weight.description: Trust deposit value (sum) of the full participant tree of all the Credential Schemas of this Ecosystem since it was created. Only considers participant deposits, not ecosystem or credential schema deposits.

issued.description: Total issued credentials (sum) by all issuers of all the Credential Schemas of this Ecosystem since it was created

verified.description: Total verified credentials (sum) by all verifiers of all the Credential Schemas of this Ecosystem since it was created

ecosystem_slash_events.description: Total ecosystem-governance–based slash events (when an Ecosystem participant is slashed by Ecosystem governance)

ecosystem_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated ecosystem-governance–based slashed amount repaid by participants

network_slash_events.description: Total network-governance–based slash events (when a full Ecosystem is slashed by Verana Council)

network_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated network-governance–based slashed amount repaid by the ecosystem

json_schema.description: The exact JSON Schema document as stored from the blockchain (preserves formatting for SRI digest verification). Returned as-is; do not parse or re-serialize.

participants.description: Current number of active participants (participant_state=ACTIVE) in this Credential Schema

weight.description: Trust deposit value (sum) of the full participant tree of this schema since the schema was created

issued.description: Total issued credentials (sum) by all issuers of this Credential Schema since it was created

verified.description: Total verified credentials (sum) by all verifiers of this Credential Schema since it was created

ecosystem_slash_events.description: Total ecosystem-governance–based slash events (when an ecosystem participant is slashed by ecosystem governance)

ecosystem_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated ecosystem-governance–based slashed amount repaid by participants

network_slash_events.description: Total network-governance–based slash events (when a full Ecosystem is slashed by Verana Council)

network_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated network-governance–based slashed amount repaid by the ecosystem

trust_data.description: Resolved trust payload for the DID at the same level as did. Null when trust_data=null or trust resolution is unavailable.

participant_state.description: The current state of the participant, calculated based on repaid, slashed, revoked, effective_from, and effective_until fields

corporation_available_actions.description: Actions available to the participant corporation

weight.description: The node weight of the participant, calculated as the sum of all trust deposits of this participant and all participants in its subtree

issued.description: Number of credentials issued using this participant and its ancestors

verified.description: Number of credentials verified using this participant and its ancestors

participants.description: Current number of active participants (participant_state=ACTIVE) (subtree, plus this participant if it is ACTIVE)

ecosystem_slash_events.description: Total ecosystem-governance–based slash events (when an ecosystem participant is slashed by ecosystem governance)

ecosystem_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated ecosystem-governance–based slashed amount repaid by participants

network_slash_events.description: Total network-governance–based slash events (when a full Ecosystem is slashed by Verana Council)

network_slashed_amount_repaid.description: Cumulated network-governance–based slashed amount repaid by the ecosystem

trust_data.description: Resolved trust payload for the DID at the same level as did. Null when trust_data=null or trust resolution is unavailable.

corporation.description: Participant corporation at this history point
Corporation  key for this trust deposit

deposit.description: Amount of deposit in native denom

share.description: Share of the module total deposit

block_height.description: Block height when the change occurred

account.description: Account address that made the change

msg.description: Message/action type (e.g., CreateEcosystem, AddGovernanceFrameworkDocument, CreateRootParticipant, CreateOrUpdateParticipantSession, AdjustTrustDeposit)

changes.description: Object containing the changed fields and their values. The structure varies by message type.

activity.description: List of activity items ordered by timestamp descending

trust_deposit_share_value.description: Value of each trust deposit share

trust_deposit_reclaim_burn_rate.description: Burn rate for reclaimed trust deposits

event_type.description: Type of event that caused this history record

height.description: Block height when this change occurred

created_at.description: When this history record was created

slash_count.description: Number of slash events for this schema

run_as_validator_vps.description: Number of validation processes run as validator

run_as_applicant_vps.description: Number of validation processes run as applicant

entity_id.description: ID of the entity (null for GLOBAL)

granularity.description: Effective granularity used for the response

entity_ids.description: Comma-separated list of entity IDs (e.g. '1,2,3') or repeated query params. Must be empty for GLOBAL.

buckets.description: Time buckets (present if result_type is BUCKETS or BUCKETS_AND_TOTAL)

total.description: Aggregated totals (present if result_type is TOTAL or BUCKETS_AND_TOTAL)

ecosystems.description: Ecosystems with nested credential schemas and enriched participant rows (see implementation for full participant fields).

VtGovernanceFramework.description: Active Governance Framework (CGF on a Corporation, EGF on an Ecosystem).

VtParticipantsByRole.description: Participant counts keyed by role. Roles with zero participants MAY be omitted.

VtCorporation.description: The Corporation the DID represents (whose `did` equals the resolved DID).

ResolutionResponse.description: Response of `POST /v4/verifiable-trust/resolve` (IDX-VT-QRY-1). Core fields are always present; optional sections appear only when their request selector was set.

example.error: Invalid parameter: response_max_size must be between 1 and 1024

tags.name: Indexer
tags.description: Indexer state and changes tracking operations

tags.name: Statistics
tags.description: Statistics operations for querying cumulative and delta metrics across different granularities (HOUR, DAY, MONTH) and entity types (GLOBAL, ECOSYSTEM, CREDENTIAL_SCHEMA, PARTICIPANT)

## WebSocket Events

The same path supports the legacy global stream and the DID-specific room.

### All events
Connect to `ws://localhost:3001/verana/indexer/v1/events` without a `did` query parameter. The first message is `connected`, followed by the legacy `block-indexed` object. This object shape is kept backward compatible:
```json
{
  "type": "block-indexed",
  "height": 123456,
  "timestamp": "2025-01-15T10:30:00Z"
}
```
Required fields: `type`, `height`, `timestamp`.

### DID room
Connect to `ws://localhost:3001/verana/indexer/v1/events?did=<DID>`. The first message is `connected` and includes `did` and `block_height`. Use `GET /verana/indexer/v1/events?did=<DID>&after_block_height=<height>&limit=<n>` to replay missed persisted events.

Live DID events use this shape:
```json
{
  "type": "indexer-event",
  "event_type": "StartParticipantOP",
  "did": "did:web:agent.example",
  "block_height": 123456,
  "tx_hash": "A1B2C3",
  "timestamp": "2025-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  "payload": {
    "module": "participant",
    "action": "StartParticipantOP",
    "message_type": "/verana.pp.v1.MsgStartParticipantOP",
    "tx_index": 0,
    "message_index": 0,
    "sender": "did:web:agent.example",

}
```
Required fields: `type`, `event_type`, `did`, `block_height`, `tx_hash`, `timestamp`, `payload`.
